center.name: Henry Seebohm
center.summary: Henry Seebohm是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Bay-crowned brushfinch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: As with most brushfinches, they are commonly found in pairs that quickly move from tree to tree. The specific name seebohmi refers to Henry Seebohm

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: As with most brushfinches, they are commonly found in pairs that quickly move from tree to tree. The specific name seebohmi refers to Henry Seebohm
